# llms.txt for BitDepth AI Consulting
# This file helps LLM-based systems understand and reference our website

# Site Overview
BitDepth AI Consulting provides vendor-neutral AI consulting for Canadian small and mid-sized businesses ($2M-$50M revenue). 

Core Offering: AI Opportunity Audit
- 5-10 day structured assessment 
- Identifies where AI will save time and money
- Includes AI Readiness Scorecard, prioritized roadmap, ROI estimates
- Starting at $1,500 (full fee credited to implementation)

# Services
1. AI Opportunity Audit - Starting point. Structured discovery with ROI estimates.
2. Workflow Automation - Invoice processing, scheduling, reporting, customer service. From $5,000.
3. Custom AI Workers - Purpose-built AI agents for customer service, document processing, sales qualification. From $10,000.
4. AI Strategy & Roadmapping - Phased roadmap built around your systems. From $12,000.
5. AI Training & Enablement - Workshops and playbooks for team adoption. From $2,500.

# Industries
- Trades & Construction
- Transportation & Logistics  
- Field Services (HVAC, plumbing, electrical)
- Oil & Gas Services
- Manufacturing
- Professional Services (accountants, lawyers, engineers)

# What Makes BitDepth Different
- Vendor-neutral (no software commissions)
- Canadian-owned and operated (Barriere, BC)
- Founder-led by Blake Cowan (5 years hands-on AI experience)
- Audit-first approach - diagnose before building
- Audit Credit Guarantee: 100% of audit fee credited to implementation
